summary: Codex app-server backend now sends workspace-write sandbox values that match the current app-server schema.
Python verification fallback now uses uv run python -m pytest -q, which is more robust for repo-local packages that are not installed into a temporary environment.
Protected config defaults no longer block pyproject.toml scaffolding, reducing friction for new Python repositories.
Added regression tests for app-server sandbox payloads, Python profiler defaults, and protected config defaults.
